name: Host Data Showcase
description: Demonstrates reading app, workspace, and document data, persisting extension state, and performing a safe document update.
author: OpenWriter

docPanels.title: Host data
docPanels.description: Shows app, workspace, document, and extension state.

commands.title: Host Data Showcase: Refresh snapshot
commands.description: Read app, workspace, and document state and persist the latest snapshot.

commands.title: Host Data Showcase: Log snapshot
commands.description: Read current host state and write it to the extension log.

commands.title: Host Data Showcase: Append inspection note
commands.description: Append a clearly labeled note to the active document.

commands.title: Host Data Showcase: Clear extension state
commands.description: Clear the extension storage used by the showcase.
